fields.dynamicSpreadEnabledDescription: Briefly expands the crosshair after shooting
fields.hitEffectEnabledDescription: Play a short visual response when targets are hit. Off by default.
fields.hitEffectTypeDescription: Choose balloon pop, energy burst, explosion impact, nuclear blast, or blood mist.

balloon.description: Colorful shards pop outward like a balloon burst.
balloon.title: Balloon Pop

burst.description: Neon shards and an expanding ring for crisp feedback.
burst.title: Energy Burst

explosion.description: Warm core flash and sparks for heavier hit impact.
explosion.title: Explosion

nuke.description: Huge flash, shockwaves, dense sparks, and fading screen shake.
nuke.title: Nuclear Blast

bloodMist.description: Soft mist particles spray outward using the target color.
bloodMist.title: Blood Mist

messages.durationNote: Start countdown defaults to 3 seconds and is shared by every mode. Game duration changes take effect the next time training restarts and do not force-change the current paused run.
messages.fpsLimitNote: A lower, stable FPS cap can reduce frame-time spikes. Changes apply to the training view immediately.
messages.hitEffectNote: Hit effects are off by default. When enabled, they play at the hit position without affecting scoring.
messages.placeholder: This menu slot is reserved and can be extended when concrete gameplay options are added.
messages.targetNote: The default target color now uses the current visual primary color, keeping it aligned with the home page and button style.

duration.description: Start countdown and game duration by mode
duration.title: Duration

fps.description: Cap render FPS for smoother pacing
fps.title: FPS Limit
